languages.text: "Вам не нужны мои наставления, {name}. Я наблюдал за вами, и вынужден признать — мне нечему вас учить. Вы совершаете ошибки — но их делал и я. Важнее то, что вы справляетесь с вызовами, что бросают вам враги, и вы тверды в своих решениях. Мое присутствие подле вас лишь породит смуту среди тех, кто желает вам зла, и тем ослабит династию — а это вовсе не то, чего я желаю протекторату".

traits.locale_text: "Вам не нужны мои наставления, {name}. Я наблюдал за вами, и вынужден признать — мне нечему вас учить. Вы совершаете ошибки — но их делал и я. Важнее то, что вы справляетесь с вызовами, что бросают вам враги, и вы тверды в своих решениях. Мое присутствие подле вас лишь породит смуту среди тех, кто желает вам зла, и тем ослабит династию — а это вовсе не то, чего я желаю протекторату".

languages.text: "You are in no need of instruction from me, {name}. I've been observing you, and I have to admit that I have nothing to teach you. You have made mistakes — but so did I. What matters more is that you meet your foes' challenges and are firm in your decisions. My presence at your side would only stir up those who wish you ill, thus weakening the dynasty — and that's not what I want for the protectorate."
languages.original_text: "Вам не нужны мои наставления, {name}. Я наблюдал за вами, и вынужден признать — мне нечему вас учить. Вы совершаете ошибки — но их делал и я. Важнее то, что вы справляетесь с вызовами, что бросают вам враги, и вы тверды в своих решениях. Мое присутствие подле вас лишь породит смуту среди тех, кто желает вам зла, и тем ослабит династию — а это вовсе не то, чего я желаю протекторату".

traits.locale_text: "You are in no need of instruction from me, {name}. I have observed you, and I must admit that I have nothing to teach you. You have made mistakes — but so did I. What matters more is that you meet your foes' challenges and are firm in your decisions. My presence at your side would only stir unrest among those who wish you ill, thus weakening the dynasty — which is the opposite of what I want for the protectorate."

"You are in no need of instruction from me, {name}. I've been observing you, and I have to admit that I have nothing to teach you. You have made mistakes — but so did I. What matters more is that you meet your foes' challenges and are firm in your decisions. My presence at your side would only stir up those who wish you ill, thus weakening the dynasty — and that's not what I want for the protectorate."

languages.text: "Ihr braucht keine Anweisungen von mir, {name}. Ich habe Euch beobachtet und muss zugeben, dass ich Euch nichts lehren kann. Ihr habt Fehler gemacht ... genau wie ich. Viel wichtiger ist aber, dass Ihr Euch den Herausforderungen Eurer Feinde stellt und zu Euren Entscheidungen steht. Bliebe ich an Eurer Seite, würden sich nur jene regen, die Euch Böses und die Dynastie schwächen wollen ... und das ist nicht, was ich mir für das Protektorat wünsche."
languages.original_text: "You are in no need of instruction from me, {name}. I've been observing you, and I have to admit that I have nothing to teach you. You have made mistakes — but so did I. What matters more is that you meet your foes' challenges and are firm in your decisions. My presence at your side would only stir up those who wish you ill, thus weakening the dynasty — and that's not what I want for the protectorate."

traits.locale_text: "Ihr braucht keine Anweisungen von mir, {name}. Ich habe Euch beobachtet und muss zugeben, dass ich Euch nichts lehren kann. Ihr habt Fehler gemacht ... genau wie ich. Viel wichtiger ist aber, dass Ihr Euch den Herausforderungen Eurer Feinde stellt und zu Euren Entscheidungen steht. Bliebe ich an Eurer Seite, würden sich nur jene regen, die Euch Böses und die Dynastie schwächen wollen ... und das ist nicht, was ich mir für das Protektorat wünsche."

languages.text: « Vous n'avez nullement besoin de mes conseils, {name}. J'ai pris le temps de vous observer, et je dois bien avouer que je n'ai rien à vous apprendre. Il vous arrive de faire des erreurs, mais n'en ai-je pas faites moi-même ? Le plus important, c'est que vous vous montriez à la hauteur de vos adversaires et que vous ne tergiversiez pas pendant des heures. Ma présence à vos côtés ne viendrait qu'attiser la colère de ceux qui vous veulent du mal, et ainsi affaiblir la dynastie ; ce n'est pas ce que je souhaite pour le protectorat. »
languages.original_text: "You are in no need of instruction from me, {name}. I've been observing you, and I have to admit that I have nothing to teach you. You have made mistakes — but so did I. What matters more is that you meet your foes' challenges and are firm in your decisions. My presence at your side would only stir up those who wish you ill, thus weakening the dynasty — and that's not what I want for the protectorate."

traits.locale_text: « Vous n'avez nullement besoin de mes conseils, {name}. J'ai pris le temps de vous observer, et je dois bien avouer que je n'ai rien à vous apprendre. Il vous arrive de faire des erreurs, mais n'en ai-je pas faites moi-même ? Le plus important, c'est que vous vous montriez à la hauteur de vos adversaires et que vous ne tergiversiez pas pendant des heures. Ma présence à vos côtés ne viendrait qu'attiser la colère de ceux qui vous veulent du mal, et ainsi affaiblir la dynastie ; ce n'est pas ce que je souhaite pour le protectorat. »

languages.text: «No necesita mi instrucción, {name}. L{mf|e|a} he estado observando y debo admitir que no tengo nada que enseñarle. Ha cometido errores, pero yo también. Lo más importante es que acepta los desafíos de sus oponentes y se mantiene firme en sus decisiones. Mi presencia a su lado solo dará munición a quienes ansían su caída, lo que supondría una debilidad para la dinastía, y eso no es lo que quiero para el protectorado».
languages.original_text: "You are in no need of instruction from me, {name}. I've been observing you, and I have to admit that I have nothing to teach you. You have made mistakes — but so did I. What matters more is that you meet your foes' challenges and are firm in your decisions. My presence at your side would only stir up those who wish you ill, thus weakening the dynasty — and that's not what I want for the protectorate."

traits.locale_text: «No necesita mi instrucción, {name}. L{mf|e|a} he estado observando y debo admitir que no tengo nada que enseñarle. Ha cometido errores, pero yo también. Lo más importante es que acepta los desafíos de sus oponentes y se mantiene firme en sus decisiones. Mi presencia a su lado solo dará munición a quienes ansían su caída, lo que supondría una debilidad para la dinastía, y eso no es lo que quiero para el protectorado».

languages.text: "Benden alacağın derslere ihtiyacın yok {name}. Seni gözlemliyordum ve sana öğretecek hiçbir şeyim olmadığını kabul etmeliyim. Hatalar yaptın... Fakat ben de yaptım. Daha önemlisi, düşmanlarının meydan okumalarını karşılayabiliyor ve kararlarından şüphe duymuyorsun. Yanında bulunmam sadece senin kötülüğünü isteyenleri kışkırtacak, böylece hanedanlığı zayıflatacaktır. Protektora için istediğim şey bu değil."
languages.original_text: "You are in no need of instruction from me, {name}. I've been observing you, and I have to admit that I have nothing to teach you. You have made mistakes — but so did I. What matters more is that you meet your foes' challenges and are firm in your decisions. My presence at your side would only stir up those who wish you ill, thus weakening the dynasty — and that's not what I want for the protectorate."

traits.locale_text: "Benden alacağın derslere ihtiyacın yok {name}. Seni gözlemliyordum ve sana öğretecek hiçbir şeyim olmadığını kabul etmeliyim. Hatalar yaptın... Fakat ben de yaptım. Daha önemlisi, düşmanlarının meydan okumalarını karşılayabiliyor ve kararlarından şüphe duymuyorsun. Yanında bulunmam sadece senin kötülüğünü isteyenleri kışkırtacak, böylece hanedanlığı zayıflatacaktır. Protektora için istediğim şey bu değil."

languages.text: “你不需要我的指导，{name}。我一直在观察你，说实话，我已经没什么可教你的了。你犯过错误——我也犯过。但更重要的是，你能直面敌人的挑战，对自己的决定坚定不移。我留在你身边，只会让那些盼着你倒霉的人借机生事，到头来反而会拖累王朝。我可不想让属地陷入那种局面。”
languages.original_text: "You are in no need of instruction from me, {name}. I've been observing you, and I have to admit that I have nothing to teach you. You have made mistakes — but so did I. What matters more is that you meet your foes' challenges and are firm in your decisions. My presence at your side would only stir up those who wish you ill, thus weakening the dynasty — and that's not what I want for the protectorate."

traits.locale_text: “你不需要我的指导，{name}。我一直在观察你，说实话，我已经没什么可教你的了。你犯过错误——我也犯过。但更重要的是，你能直面敌人的挑战，对自己的决定坚定不移。我留在你身边，只会让那些盼着你倒霉的人借机生事，到头来反而会拖累王朝。我可不想让属地陷入那种局面。”

languages.text: 「君には私の教えは必要ない。私は君を観察してきたが、君に教えることは何もない。君が間違えたこともあるが、私も間違えた。大切なのは、君が敵の挑戦に立ち向かい、決断を固めることだ。私の存在は君に悪意を持つ者たちを刺激し、王朝を弱体化させるだけだ。私は君が守護者として君臨することを望んでいる。」
languages.original_text: "You are in no need of instruction from me, {name}. I've been observing you, and I have to admit that I have nothing to teach you. You have made mistakes — but so did I. What matters more is that you meet your foes' challenges and are firm in your decisions. My presence at your side would only stir up those who wish you ill, thus weakening the dynasty — and that's not what I want for the protectorate."

traits.locale_text: 「君には私の教えは必要ない。私は君を観察してきたが、君に教えることは何もない。君が間違えたこともあるが、私も間違えた。大切なのは、君が敵の挑戦に立ち向かい、決断を固めることだ。私の存在は君に悪意を持つ者たちを刺激し、王朝を弱体化させるだけだ。私は君が守護者として君臨することを望んでいる。」
